stories.title: Extend Shorts from 49s to 70s+
stories.body: Leaders average ~77s; your ~49s leaves engagement room on the floor. Your highest-performer (17 views) likely benefited from extra watch-time — stretch narrative pacing, add reaction shots, or slow the reveal to hit 70+ seconds minimum.
